target.title: chore: fix esbuild production audit failure
target.body:
## Summary

- update the root esbuild pin from 0.28.0 to 0.28.1, the first patched version for GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr
- refresh pnpm-lock.yaml so Vite/Vitest/tsx-resolved esbuild entries and every @esbuild platform package resolve to 0.28.1
- add version-scoped minimumReleaseAge exclusions for esbuild 0.28.1 and its matching @esbuild platform packages so the security patch can pass pnpm's lockfile policy before the normal 48-hour maturity window expires

## Verification

- node scripts/pre-commit/pnpm-audit-prod.mjs --audit-level=high
- node --input-type=module -e 'import {readFile} from "node:fs/promises"; import {collectProdResolvedPackagesFromLockfile} from "./scripts/pre-commit/pnpm-audit-prod.mjs"; const versions = collectProdResolvedPackagesFromLockfile(await readFile("pnpm-lock.yaml", "utf8")); console.log(JSON.stringify({esbuild:[...(versions.get("esbuild") ?? [])]}, null, 2));'
- pnpm install --lockfile-only --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts
- pnpm exec esbuild --version
- pnpm exec tsx --version
- pnpm changed:lanes --json
- node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --check
- pnpm deps:root-ownership:check
- git diff --check
- pnpm build
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt 'Review the scoped dependency security fix for GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr. Diff should only update esbuild to 0.28.1, keep pnpm release-age bypass narrowly scoped, and preserve lock/shrinkwrap/build/audit behavior.'
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt 'Review the follow-up reduction that removes the esbuild override while keeping the esbuild 0.28.1 package bump, lockfile resolution, and temporary release-age exclusions. Check that the security audit remains fixed and no stale override/config mismatch remains.'

## Notes

Observed while investigating PR #91484 security-fast at head 39fd11f0bd. That PR has no dependency file changes; the same audit failed on current origin/main before this fix.

Provenance: PR #87162 first added the root esbuild 0.28.0 pin. PR #88814 later carried that package/lock state forward. The CI failure was made visible when GitHub published GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr on 2026-06-12 with vulnerable range >=0.17.0 <0.28.1.
target.author: romneyda
